exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND EffectiveDate < '2021-07-15'

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND EffectiveDate < '2021-07-15'

result.preview: [{"OrderId": "801Wt00000PHRYWIA5", "OrderItemId": "802Wt0000079AU1IAM", "Product2Id": "01tWt000006hV8LIAU", "ProductName": "AI Cirku-Tech", "ProductDescription": "AI-driven circuit design platform offering rapid prototyping and innovation support."}]

args.query: SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, oi.Id AS OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName, p.Description AS ProductDescription FROM "Order" o INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId INNER JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-15' AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing unit%' OR LOWER(p.Description) LIKE '%processing%')

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, oi.Id AS OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName, p.Description AS ProductDescription FROM "Order" o INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId INNER JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-15' AND (p.Name LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Description LIKE '%AI%' OR p.Name LIKE '%processing unit%' OR LOWER(p.Description) LIKE '%processing%')
